---
title: "Math 158 Project Proposal"
author: Yatziri I. Carmona Ochoa & Yeylin Mendoza
format: pdf
editor: visual
execute:
  warning: false
  message: false
---

## Introduction

### Dataset

For our project, we will be utilizing the sleep dataset.

```{r}
library(readr)
sleep_data <- read_csv("Sleep_health_and_lifestyle_dataset.csv")
```

### Research Question

## Methods

## Results

## Interpretation, Limitations, and Future Directions

## Conclusion
